prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes, grafana/grafana, and prometheus/prometheus that implement OpenTelemetry or Jaeger trace context propagation: the trace context injection into outgoing requests and the extraction from incoming request headers.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes, grafana/grafana, and prometheus/prometheus that implement OpenTelemetry or Jaeger trace context propagation: the trace context injection into outgoing requests and the extraction from incoming request headers.
